chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-967 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. 5121/2024 10.07.2024 Mr. Sajjad Ahmed Chandio advocate for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. Mr. Irfan Ahmed Qureshi advocate for respondents 2 to 4. Urgency granted. With the consent of all parties present, this petition is disposed of with the directions that the applications filed by the petitioners available at pages 209 till 241 shall be decided at the earliest, preferably within one week. Pending decision thereof, the respondents shall refrain from taking any coercive action against the petitioners. Petition is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Ali Haider
